## When to Contact Your Supplier

Some questions are best answered with a direct conversation with your supplier. Consider reaching out if:

1. Your requirement falls outside standard specification ranges
2. You need documentation beyond standard COA packages
3. The question involves contractual terms such as Incoterms, payment terms, or liability
4. You need product samples for evaluation

## JSON-LD Structured Data

This FAQ page is structured to support Schema.org FAQPage markup for AI search engines. The questions and answers above can be embedded using the following structure:

```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "[Question 1]",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "[Short answer to question 1]"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```
